antigravity_skill_orchestration.directives: Utilize 'antigravity-design-expert' to implement a 'Dossier' card system. Use 'tailwind-patterns' for elegant retro-typography. Direct 'performance-optimizer' to ensure the high-detail Tatsuya Endo art loads with zero layout shift.

generation_prompts.landing_page_ui: Build a 'Secret Agent Terminal' UI with Tailwind CSS 4.1. 1. HERO: A cinematic composition of the Forger family in a high-contrast 'spy silhouette' style. Title 'SPY x FAMILY ONLINE' in elegant 'DM Serif' with a subtle ink-stamp texture. 2. CHAPTER GRID: Design cards styled as 'Classified Envelopes'. Each card features a manila folder texture, a 'Confidential' watermark, and a paper-clip icon holding the chapter thumbnail. 3. NAV: A clean, minimalist top bar with 'Mission' (Chapters), 'Intel' (About), and 'Secure Line' (Contact) links.
generation_prompts.seo_geo_strategy: Activate 'seo-geo' and 'ai-seo' to target Global regions. Generate localized meta-tags for 'Read Spy x Family Manga Online' and 'Loid Forger Mission Analysis'. Inject 'ComicSeries' JSON-LD to secure rich snippets in Google Search.
generation_prompts.technical_files: Generate a compliant robots.txt, a dynamic sitemap.xml for all chapters, and a .htaccess for optimized asset delivery. Use 'seo-sitemap' to prioritize the latest missions.

technical_architectures.image_workflow: Convert all chapter scans to AVIF via 'python-performance-optimization'. Implement 'Progressive Blur' loading for the elegant double-page spreads. Use 'Intersection Observer' for seamless vertical scrolling.
technical_architectures.tag_integration: Inject G-NXKN3VT9XD tracking. Set up 'Anya Reaction' events (tracking clicks on specific high-engagement panels) to measure user interaction.

interactive_elements: Dossier Open: Chapter cards 'unfold' with a paper-opening sound and animation on hover.
Redacted Text: Footer links appear as 'Blacked Out' text that reveals on hover.
Stella Star Progress: A custom scrollbar featuring a glowing 'Stella Star' that moves as you read.
Telepathic Ripple: Subtle 'mind-wave' circular ripples emanating from Anya's position in the hero section.
